query:
SELECT 'receipts' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM receipts
UNION ALL SELECT 'transactions', COUNT(*) FROM transactions
UNION ALL SELECT 'mileage_logs', COUNT(*) FROM mileage_logs
UNION ALL SELECT 'notary_sessions', COUNT(*) FROM notary_sessions
UNION ALL SELECT 'chat_messages', COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages
UNION ALL SELECT 'remote_returns', COUNT(*) FROM remote_returns
UNION ALL SELECT 'academy_courses', COUNT(*) FROM academy_courses
UNION ALL SELECT 'academy_lessons', COUNT(*) FROM academy_lessons
UNION ALL SELECT 'promo_codes', COUNT(*) FROM promo_codes
UNION ALL SELECT 'audit_items', COUNT(*) FROM audit_items
UNION ALL SELECT 'business_entities', COUNT(*) FROM business_entities
UNION ALL SELECT 'quarterly_payments', COUNT(*) FROM quarterly_payments
UNION ALL SELECT 'crypto_transactions', COUNT(*) FROM crypto_transactions
UNION ALL SELECT 'efile_submissions', COUNT(*) FROM efile_submissions
UNION ALL SELECT 'lead_magnets', COUNT(*) FROM lead_magnets
UNION ALL SELECT 'return_documents', COUNT(*) FROM return_documents
UNION ALL SELECT 'academy_progress', COUNT(*) FROM academy_progress
UNION ALL SELECT 'promo_redemptions', COUNT(*) FROM promo_redemptions;
